title: Day surgery follow-up call documentation

treatment_and_management.text: Supports patient-centred explanation, understandable language, interpreter support, written information, questions, and documented education.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports understandable information, questions and documented education for day surgery follow-up call documentation; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports patient-centred explanation, understandable language, interpreter support, written information, questions, and documented education.

follow_up.text: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.
follow_up.rationale: Supports recovery, complications, discharge instructions, handover and follow-up documentation for day surgery follow-up call documentation; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.

follow_up.text: Supports complete, contemporaneous records for assessment, consent, anesthesia or sedation, procedure, monitoring, recovery, discharge, complications, and follow-up.
follow_up.rationale: Supports contemporaneous procedure, recovery, discharge, complication and follow-up records for day surgery follow-up call documentation; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports complete, contemporaneous records for assessment, consent, anesthesia or sedation, procedure, monitoring, recovery, discharge, complications, and follow-up.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Procedure-specific symptoms, wound findings, medicines, escalation thresholds, emergency disposition and specialty follow-up decisions remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for day surgery follow-up call documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
